currentPhase: mobile-redesign: Phase 1 (brand assets) done and captured; Phase 4 (composer/model/thinking) preserved; Phases 3, 5-18 open
currentTask: JunoMobile redesign after the owner's visual rejection. DONE: Phase 1 — real juno-mark.png as a template imageset replacing the SF Symbol 'circle.hexagongrid.fill' seven-dot stand-in; 11 navigation icons per platform generated from the installed lucide-react by scripts/generate-native-icons.mjs (the website's icons are Lucide via src/lib/app-icons.ts, NOT a bespoke set); Newsreader bundled as four real 24pt faces addressed by PostScript name; JunoGreeting ports the web's seven time-of-day buckets verbatim (9 tests); JunoAvatar loads the real account photo. ALSO: the composer '+' had TWO defects. The 13.3pt touch target (no contentShape) is FIXED, on + and Send, with UI tests asserting the frame. The dead action is NOT fixed and is the next task: the '+' centre sits at x~36, inside iOS's leading edge-pan strip, which takes the touch. Proven by moving it 40pt clear (opens first tap, every time) and by the model chip 40pt right never having the problem. Ruled out: popover anchor/arrowEdge, @State location, .animation on the Button, panel intrinsic size, the shell's own drag gesture. 20pt does not clear the strip and 40pt squeezes the model/Thinking chips until SwiftUI stops resolving the layout entirely — the same wall that blocks the 44pt touch minimum. THE CONTROL ROW MUST BE REBUILT. Reproduction is committed as XCTExpectFailure so it reports the day it passes. NOTE: the live simulator panel cannot run here — SimulatorKit.framework is absent from this Xcode-beta, so attach/tap fail; verification is simctl screenshots + XCUITests.
orphanRecoveryBranch: agent/juno-code-remote-orphan-recovery (2b353f6, pushed) — the previously uncommitted Code session relay, preserved byte-identically and deliberately NOT shipped: its routes are not in the published contract, it has no native callers, and its migration sorts before already-applied history
